info.name: Maximo MAS 9 OSLC - Administration (SETUP)
info.description:
Maximo MAS 9 OSLC - Administration (SETUP)
75 endpoints including script deployment.
Use 'MAS9-Demo' environment.

request.description: Create a new automation script with source code, variables, and launch point in a single POST.
Update an existing automation script's source code and status. Use the script's ID from a GET request.
Get full automation script details including source code, variables, and launch points.
List all automation scripts with their status.
Delete an automation script by ID.
